font.description: Font definition with family and optional formatting properties

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

anyOf.description: Line spacing configuration

keepNext.description: Keep heading with next paragraph on same page

keepLines.description: Keep all lines of heading together on same page

paragraph.description: Paragraph component props (font nested for theme consistency; no flat font properties)

font.description: Font definition with family and optional formatting properties

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

horizontalPosition.description: Horizontal positioning (use either align or offset, not both)

anyOf.description: Horizontal offset in twips (1/20 of a point)
Horizontal offset as percentage (e.g., "50%") relative to page or margin width

verticalPosition.description: Vertical positioning (use either align or offset, not both)

anyOf.description: Vertical offset in twips (1/20 of a point)
Vertical offset as percentage (e.g., "50%") relative to page or margin height

keepNext.description: Keep paragraph with next paragraph on same page

keepLines.description: Keep all lines of paragraph together on same page

id.description: Unique identifier for internal linking (bookmark anchor)

path.description: Image source URL or file path (mutually exclusive with base64)

base64.description: Base64-encoded image data in data URI format (e.g., "data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgo...") (mutually exclusive with path)

width.description: Image width in pixels (number) or as percentage string (e.g., "90%")

anyOf.description: Image width in pixels
Image width as percentage (e.g., "90%") relative to widthRelativeTo (defaults to content width)

height.description: Image height in pixels (number) or as percentage string (e.g., "90%")

anyOf.description: Image height in pixels
Image height as percentage (e.g., "90%") relative to heightRelativeTo (defaults to content height)

widthRelativeTo.description: Reference for width percentages: content (page width minus margins) or page (full page width)

heightRelativeTo.description: Reference for height percentages: content (page height minus margins) or page (full page height)

horizontalPosition.description: Horizontal positioning (use either align or offset, not both)

anyOf.description: Horizontal offset in twips (1/20 of a point)
Horizontal offset as percentage (e.g., "50%") relative to page or margin width

verticalPosition.description: Vertical positioning (use either align or offset, not both)

anyOf.description: Vertical offset in twips (1/20 of a point)
Vertical offset as percentage (e.g., "50%") relative to page or margin height
Top margin in twips
Top margin as percentage of page height
Bottom margin in twips
Bottom margin as percentage of page height
Left margin in twips
Left margin as percentage of page width
Right margin in twips
Right margin as percentage of page width

allowOverlap.description: Allow element to overlap with other elements

zIndex.description: Z-order for overlapping elements (must be non-negative)

keepNext.description: Keep paragraph with next paragraph on same page

keepLines.description: Keep all lines of paragraph together on same page

table.description: Table component props with column-based structure

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Hide all borders when true
Selectively hide specific borders

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

backgroundColor.description: Hex color with # prefix, theme color name, or "transparent"

size.description: Font size in points

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Padding for all sides in points

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

backgroundColor.description: Hex color with # prefix, theme color name, or "transparent"

size.description: Font size in points

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Padding for all sides in points

columns.description: Table columns with headers and cells

anyOf.description: Column width in points. When set on some columns, remaining columns will automatically share the leftover table space equally. Leave undefined to distribute space evenly among unspecified columns.
Column width as percentage of available width (e.g., "40%")

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

backgroundColor.description: Hex color with # prefix, theme color name, or "transparent"

size.description: Font size in points

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Padding for all sides in points

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

backgroundColor.description: Hex color with # prefix, theme color name, or "transparent"

size.description: Font size in points

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Padding for all sides in points

color.description: Hex color with # prefix (e.g. "#000000") or theme color name

backgroundColor.description: Hex color with # prefix, theme color name, or "transparent"

size.description: Font size in points

anyOf.description: Border color for all sides (hex without #)
Border size for all sides in points
Padding for all sides in points

keepInOnePage.description: Keep table rows together on the same page by setting keepNext on all paragraphs

keepNext.description: Set keepNext on the last row to keep it connected to the next element. Works independently of keepInOnePage. Defaults to false.

repeatHeaderOnPageBreak.description: Repeat the header row on each page when the table spans multiple pages. Defaults to false.

anyOf.description: Section header modules
Link header to previous section
Section footer modules
Link footer to previous section

page.description: Page configuration override for this section (overrides theme page settings)

anyOf.description: Number of equal-width columns (converter will normalize to array)
List of columns in order; width and gap can be points, percentages, or auto width
Column width in points
Column width as percentage of available width (e.g., "30%")
Auto width: consume remaining space after fixed widths and gaps
Gap after this column in points
Gap after this column as percentage of available width (e.g., "5%")
Default gap applied after each column except the last (points)
Default gap applied after each column except the last as percentage of available width (e.g., "5%")

reference.description: Unique reference ID for this numbering configuration (auto-generated if not provided)

items.description: Configuration for a single list level

level.description: Nesting level (0 = root, 1 = first sublevel, etc.)

format.description: Number or bullet format for list levels

text.description: Number format string (e.g., "%1." for "1.", "%1)" for "1)", custom bullet character for bullet format)

format.description: Format for level 0 (simplified option when levels not specified)

anyOf.description: Number or bullet format for list levels

bullet.description: Custom bullet character (simplified option when levels not specified)

start.description: Starting number for level 0 (simplified option when levels not specified)

spacing.description: List spacing configuration with item spacing

item.description: Spacing between list items in points

anyOf.description: Indentation configuration
